title: Junior Frontend Developer at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions:
HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions!
